bone.$description: Bone — Primary text, hairline borders, navigation labels, link color, icon strokes — the sole chromatic element in the UI layer, a warm off-white that avoids clinical sterility

void.$description: Void — Page canvas, section backgrounds, every surface — pure black, not a near-black

maroon-gradient.$description: Maroon Gradient — Full-bleed atmospheric section background — deep oxidized red creating a candlelit warmth against the surrounding void

violet-gradient.$description: Violet Gradient — Full-bleed atmospheric section background — deep indigo wash, a cold counterpoint to the maroon sections

crimson-gradient.$description: Crimson Gradient — Full-bleed atmospheric section background — burnt blood red, the most aggressive gradient stop

plum-gradient.$description: Plum Gradient — Full-bleed atmospheric section background — dark mulberry, a muted violet-red transition

olive-gradient.$description: Olive Gradient — Full-bleed atmospheric section background — sickly yellow-green, the only non-red gradient, used sparingly for contrast

nb-akademie.$description: Display and heading typeface. Custom serif used exclusively for monumental headlines at 121px with extremely tight leading (0.85) that makes characters nearly touch. The 400 weight at display size is deliberate restraint — the scale and tight tracking do the work that bold weight would do in other systems. Letter-spacing tightens further at larger sizes.

nb-akademie-mono.$description: UI and monospace workhorse — navigation, body text, metadata, links, icons, and the 32px mid-scale heading tier. At 11px the negative tracking (-0.045em) compresses characters into a dense data-stream aesthetic. The monospaced face contrasts with the display serif to create a document/blueprint duality: editorial headlines above, technical metadata below.
